name: production-agent-system
description: Generated production AI Agent system template.

scripts.eval: npm run build && node dist/src/evals/eval-runner.js --dataset all
scripts.eval:smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/evals/eval-runner.js --dataset smoke
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.worker:dev: npm run build && npm run worker
